title: Yasna 44: Questions to Ahura Mazda
description: Zoroaster questions Ahura Mazda about the nature of creation, truth, and cosmic order.
introduction: Zoroaster questions Ahura Mazda about the nature of creation, truth, and cosmic order.

translation.original_text: tat θβā pərəsā ərəš mōi vaocā ahurā: kas hātąm xratūš paourvīm dadāt?
translation.text: This I ask you, tell me truly, Lord: who was the first father of Truth? Who established the course of the sun and stars?
